data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Emperor Entertainment Hotel ( (HK:0296) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited has announced a significant reduction in its net loss for the six months ending September 30, 2025. The company’s net loss is expected to narrow to no more than HK$80 million, a substantial improvement from the previous year’s HK$226 million. This improvement is largely attributed to a decrease in fair value loss on investment properties, which is a non-cash item and does not directly impact the company’s cash flow. The interim results are set to be published in late November 2025, and stakeholders are advised to exercise caution when dealing with the company’s securities.

More about Emperor Entertainment Hotel

Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited, incorporated in Bermuda, operates within the hospitality and entertainment industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on providing hotel and entertainment services, primarily in the Hong Kong market.

China Evergrande New Energy Vehicle Group ( (HK:0708) ) just unveiled an announcement.

China Evergrande New Energy Vehicle Group Limited has announced that the People’s Court of Binhai New District of Tianjin Municipality has accepted a creditor’s petition for the bankruptcy and liquidation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Evergrande New Energy Vehicle (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. This subsidiary, which owns a major manufacturing base in Tianjin, has had its production suspended since January 2024. Additionally, trading of the company’s shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange has been suspended since April 2025, pending the publication of outstanding financial results and compliance with resumption guidance.

China Datang Corp. Renewable Power Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1798) ) has provided an update.

China Datang Corporation Renewable Power Co., Limited announced arrangements for the payment of the principal and interest on its 2025 fifth tranche of ultra-short-term debentures. The payment, totaling RMB1.5 billion, is scheduled for November 20, 2025, with an interest rate of 1.61%. The company has outlined the payment process, emphasizing the role of the Interbank Market Clearing House Co., Ltd. in transferring funds to debenture holders. This announcement reflects the company’s ongoing financial commitments and its structured approach to managing its debt obligations.

data.title: GR Properties Limited Engages in Financial Assistance Agreements
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

An update from GR Properties Limited ( (HK:0108) ) is now available.

GR Properties Limited, through its subsidiary Beijing Wangangtong, has entered into a Guarantee Agreement and a Mortgage Agreement with Dalian Bank to provide financial assistance to a connected borrower. This involves Beijing Wangangtong bearing joint liability for the borrower’s repayment obligations and mortgaging properties to secure a loan of RMB130 million. The agreements are considered connected transactions under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules, requiring reporting and announcement due to the applicable percentage ratios. This strategic move aims to facilitate the borrower’s loan acquisition while generating a guarantee fee for Beijing Wangangtong.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0108) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GR Properties Limited stock, see the HK:0108 Stock Forecast page.

JD.com, Inc. Class A ( (HK:9618) ) has issued an announcement.

JD Logistics, a subsidiary of JD.com, has appointed Zhenhui Wang as its new CEO, effective November 13, 2025. Pu’er Lancang Ancient Tea Co., Ltd. ( (HK:6911) ) has issued an update.

Pu’er Lancang Ancient Tea Co., Ltd. has announced significant changes in its executive team, with the resignation of Ms. He Yunhong and Ms. Wong Yuen Ki from their roles as joint company secretaries and authorized representatives, effective November 13, 2025. An update from Brainhole Technology Limited ( (HK:2203) ) is now available.

Brainhole Technology Limited has been granted a waiver from strict compliance with Rule 14.41(a) of the Listing Rules by the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, allowing for a delay in the dispatch of a circular related to its further acquisition of TeraWulf shares.
